findings.summary: PAEBrightness node parity: FAITHFUL darkening (Brightness<=1: 47-99 dB) but DIVERGED brightening (Brightness 1.5-3.0: 13-16 dB, worsening with amount). Signature = FCP multiplies in LINEAR working space, TS in sRGB (see levels.ts) — sRGB multiply over-saturates brightened tones.
findings.oracle_truth_caveat: oracle_truth=gui: COLOR-family node; headless FCP has a MEASURED 13-19 dB headless-vs-GUI-export gap. The linear form that matches HEADLESS regresses the GUI gate (the one truth). Do NOT fix TS to match headless without confirming net-positive on the GUI GT (fct score). Engine ships the GUI-gate-preferred sRGB form on purpose.
findings.next: Render a Brightness host slug's GUI GT; confirm whether TS-sRGB or TS-linear scores higher vs the GUI (not headless). Adopt linear only if it wins the GUI gate; else mark CHARACTERIZED (headless-neq-gui) like Colorize/Levels.
